reviews.comment:
Lindo. Costoso. Versátil. Gran estacionamiento. Genial para viajeros. Amplio salón y opciones objetivas para socios del ACA. El combustible quizás no sea tan económico para no socios pero sirve. Medio complicado para salir por el nudo vial. Pero sirve

(Translated by Google)
Nice. Expensive. Versatile. Large parking lot. Great for commuters. Spacious lounge and targeted options for ACA members. Fuel may not be as economical for non-members, but it's fine. A bit tricky to get through the interchange. But it's fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZdktpZGlRRRAB
